title.en: Extract FerryBox data from NetCDF (THREDDS) to CSV

description.en: Extract FerryBox environmental monitoring data from a THREDDS-hosted NetCDF file. Supports optional filtering by date interval and bounding box. Outputs a CSV containing datetime, latitude, longitude, value, unit, parameter, and derived time fields.

links.title: GitHub repo of NIVA AquaINFRA tools

source.title: source
source.description: THREDDS URL to the NetCDF dataset (e.g. https://thredds.niva.no/thredds/dodsC/datasets/nrt/color_fantasy.nc).

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of parameters to extract (e.g. temperature,salinity,chlorophyll,turbidity). Use NULL (or omit) to extract all available parameters.

start_date.title: Start date
start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). If provided, end date must also be provided. Use NULL to omit.

end_date.title: End date
end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). If provided, start date must also be provided. Use NULL to omit.

study_area_bbox.title: Boundary box
study_area_bbox.description: Optional bounding box filter. Order: [lat_min, lon_min, lat_max, lon_max]. Example: {"bbox": [58.5, 9.5, 59.9, 11.9]}. Omit to use the full dataset extent.

CSV results.title: CSV output
CSV results.description: Path to the CSV file written by the process.
